title: Buttery Indian Dates Stir-fry
description: A dense and buttery weeknight dish featuring pitted dates sauteed in a simple oil mixture for a raw-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of pitted Medjool dates
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pit the dates yourself or buy them already pitted.

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Place the dates in the hot skillet and sprinkle with salt.
Drizzle butter over the dates, making sure to coat them evenly.
Sauté until the dates begin to break down into a sticky mixture that's slightly caramelized. This should take about 5-7 minutes.
Remove from heat once desired texture is achieved.
